solutions.solution: (D) From the given question figure, it is clear that 13 rows containing 1 cube each 7 rows containing 2 cubes each 1 rows containing 3 cubes ∴ Total cubes = (13 × 1) + (7 × 2) + (1× 3) = 13 + 14 + 3 = 30

(C) From the given question figure, it is clear that 1 column containing 4 cubes 2 columns containing 3 cubes each 3 columns containing 2 cubes each 4 columns containing 1 cube each ∴ Total cubes = (1× 4) + (2 × 3) + (3 × 2) + (4 × 1) = 4 + 6 + 6 + 4 = 20
